title: Iced Kombu Dressed Italian Hake Pasta
description: A refreshing and light Italian-inspired dish featuring hake, kombu-cold-extract, and a touch of tanginess from the lemon.
instructions: Soak the kombu seaweed in 1 cup of cold water for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Preheat a steamer basket with 2 cups of water and steam the hake fillets for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine the lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and a pinch of salt in a blender.
Blend the mixture until smooth and strain it through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
Add the soaked kombu seaweed and its liquid to the bowl and stir to combine.
Drain the steamed hake fillets and place them on a plate.
Pour the kombu-dressing over the hake fillets and top with cherry tomatoes and chopped basil.
Serve immediately in a lacquerware bowl.
Garnish with additional basil leaves if desired.
